/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bloodstrike_loader.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bloodstrike_loader.dir/src/loader_gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bloodstrike_loader.dir/src/stealth_injector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bloodstrike_loader.dir/src/offset_scanner.cpp.o -o bloodstrike-loader  -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lz -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ldl -lpthread
